/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/ecl_test_stencil.dir/stencil.cpp.o -o ecl_test_stencil  -Wl,-rpath,/home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_formatters/lib:/home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_exceptions/lib:/home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_errors/lib:/home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_type_traits/lib ../../gtest/libgtest_main.a ../../gtest/libgtest.a /home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_formatters/lib/libecl_formatters.so.1.2.1 -pthread /home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_exceptions/lib/libecl_exceptions.so.1.2.1 /home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_errors/lib/libecl_errors.so.1.2.0 /home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_type_traits/lib/libecl_type_traits.so.1.2.1
